subcodes.first_line: O spiritual companions! The very glances of divine bounty encompass you, and the bestowals of the All-Merciful's grace are showered upon you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران معنوی لحظات عین عنایت شامل شماست و توجهات الطاف رحمانیت فائض بر شما
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @The Holy Spirit
